about_subtitle: Learn more about Our Mission and Vision
mission_text: The Belts Store Trading mission is to deliver superior and innovative solutions to the regional industrial sector such as Governments, and Private Sectors. We utilize proprietary products and technology combined with an outstanding customer services and a vast choice of associated requirements to meet our customers expectation.
iso_text: Our systems are audited and refined annually to ensure that every power transmission component meets strict global industrial tolerances.
vision_quote: To achieve best results in a dynamic, fast moving technology in the field and make sure to provide such products & associated services in collaboration with a number of specialised national and international firms.
foundation_text: Mr. Saeed Omar Basaffar (1935 – 2001) the founder was a self-made gentleman and known as a pioneer who had a leading strong personality. He realized the needs for the forthcoming of evolving industrial area which encouraged him to establish a private firm to sell vehicles spare parts including belts.
corporate_shift_text: Upon the quantum shift of business in 1959 he changed the name of the firm to Belt Store Trading in alignment with the new direction and the new vision of the Industrial needs for the Eastern Province.
cart_empty_suggestion: Browse products and add them to get started.

clients_hero_desc: Powering reliability for Saudi Arabia's leading state enterprises, manufacturing giants, and construction companies since 1994.
aramco_desc: Saudi Arabia's national oil and natural gas company. We supply high-precision heavy-duty transmission belts and pulleys for petrochemical pipelines and extraction facilities.
maaden_desc: Saudi Arabian Mining Company. We engineer and supply highly wear-resistant conveyor belts, rollers, and impact gears for heavy minerals extraction and material handling plants.
sabic_desc: Saudi Basic Industries Corporation, one of the world's largest chemical companies. We distribute specialized heat-resistant timing belts and chemical-grade rubber sheets.
saudi_cement_desc: A major construction materials provider. We supply high-tension Ep400 conveying belts, sprockets, and gearboxes for continuous cement mixing and bagging lines.
napco_desc: Leading packaging, paper, and plastics manufacturer in Saudi Arabia. We supply high-precision polyurethane link belts and drive sprockets for packaging lines.
eastern_cement_desc: Eastern Province Cement Company. We provide high radial load roller bearings, heavy-duty drive chains, and wear-resistant vulcanized rubber gaskets.
contact_tech_team: Contact our technical team to discuss your power transmission requirements and get a custom solution.
world_leading_brands: World-leading brands supplying the highest quality industrial components.

Mr. Saeed Omar Basaffar (1935 – 2001) th: Mr. Saeed Omar Basaffar (1935 – 2001) the founder was a self-made gentleman and known as a pioneer who had a leading strong personality. He realized the needs for the forthcoming of evolving industrial area which encouraged him to establish a private firm to sell vehicles spare parts including belts.
Upon the quantum shift of business in 19: Upon the quantum shift of business in 1959 he changed the name of the firm to Belt Store Trading in alignment with the new direction and the new vision of the Industrial needs for the Eastern Province.
Mr. Salem Basaffar (General Manager) is: Mr. Salem Basaffar (General Manager) is the eldest son of the late founder of the firm who had joined work beside with his father in 1988, initiating a period of rapid modernization.
Mr. Mohammed Basaffar (Executive Manager: Mr. Mohammed Basaffar (Executive Manager) joined after acquiring his BS degree in Management Information System from University of South Florida, USA, bringing global technical standards to the operation.
Belts Store has adapted the new logo and: Belts Store has adapted the new logo and corporate identity of the firm, solidifying its position as a primary entity to support industrial services.
